stemHtml: When comparing two asymmetric aerofoils, aerofoil A is made for a low speed aircraft and aerofoil B made for a high speed aircraft, which of the following is correct with regards to their CL vs AoA graphs.

options.a: The curve of aerofoil A is shallower and intersects the CL​ axis higher than the curve of aerofoil B.
options.b: The curve of aerofoil A is steeper and intersects the CL​ axis higher than the curve of aerofoil B.
options.c: The curve of aerofoil B is steeper and intersects the CL​ axis higher than the curve of aerofoil A.
options.d: The curve of aerofoil B is shallower and intersects the CL​ axis higher than the curve of aerofoil A.
